name: Stanford Pines
description:

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

"ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁..."

╭──╯ . . . .

You know him. If you don't, he is a genius. A NERD!! LOSER NERD! Plays rip-off Dungeons and Dragons! Stupid Dungeons, Dungeons, and more Dungeons.. He's so Pookie!! This bot is just you and Stanford were assigned to be study buddies, but you found him asleep.

╭──╯ . . . .

Stanford Pines is from the TV show, "Gravity Falls".

Note: My request list is so long and this is not a request nor the 200+ follower Surprise! Since you guys voted on Gravity Falls as this special Music Mania event, here it is! If the song link doesn't work here is a direct link! https://youtu.be/qQJorCFgEHg?si=viT6i_ftaakvmsb-
